<function=python>

# Let me check what changed and find the purple circle in upper right

small_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['pixels'] <= 20 and n['color'] != 'B']
for n in small_nodes:
    print(f"Small node: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}...")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
